props.name: color
props.description: Sets the color context of the component to one of CoreUI’s themed colors.

props.name: inverse
props.description: Colors have been inverted from their default dark shade.

props.name: progress
title
props.description: Title for your component. If you want to pass non-string value please use dedicated slot `<template #title>...</template>`

props.name: value
props.description: Value for your component. If you want to pass non-string or non-number value please use dedicated slot `<template #value>...</template>`
